backend/main.mo: Primary canister actor defining user profiles, licensing, trade records, bot/vault types, and access-controlled profile APIs.
backend/migration.mo: Minimal migration module with a no-op run function returning an empty new actor.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report documenting no features yet.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of all frontend source files for documentation or tooling use.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining color tokens, dark mode theming, and base UI variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and script tag loading the main React application.
frontend/index.ts: Type definition for SignalFetchResult with ok and err variants.
frontend/PHASE1_BACKEND_IMPLEMENTATION_C: Detailed checklist specifying required backend features, types, APIs, and compatibility rules for Phase 1 implementation.
frontend/ROADMAP_BATCH_EXECUTION.md: Execution plan outlining phases, constraints, and batch tasks for frontend and backend roadmap items.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component handling authentication flow, loading states, and conditional profile setup.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button managing Internet Identity authentication and React Query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal allowing users to enter and save display name and optional account ID via a profile save hook.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Displays an alert indicating the user lacks required admin permissions.
frontend/src/components/common/ToastProv: Context provider managing toast notifications with auto-dismiss and UI rendering.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/AuditL: Fetches and displays recent audit log entries in a scrollable table with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Header with navigation between dashboard and settings, showing current user name and login button.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Equity: Loads equity curve data and renders it as a Recharts line and area chart with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LiveLo: Terminal-style panel logging bot status pings and allowing a connectivity test with success/error output.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LivePu: Duplicate of LiveLogsPanel providing a terminal view of periodic status pings and connectivity tests.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Perfor: Displays an equity curve area chart with loading, error, and empty states using fetched telemetry data.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows bot heartbeat status, license info, cycles, and warnings with dynamic indicators based on fetched heartbeat data.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Uplink: Provides a UI to view and toggle the bot’s uplink status with animated indicators and a switch.
Manages global layout, navigation, and routing between dashboard, settings, and payment result screens.
frontend/src/components/settings/Connect: Displays bot connection status and opens a wizard to configure the bot’s public key and URL.
Guides users through generating an Ed25519 keypair, linking the public key, and setting the bot URL.
frontend/src/components/settings/Profile: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/settings/StripeC: Modal for entering Stripe secret key and allowed countries, validating inputs, and saving configuration via mutation.
frontend/src/components/settings/Subscri: Displays subscription tiers, checks Stripe config, and initiates checkout sessions; admins can open the Stripe config modal.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides hooks for checking admin status and managing licenses through create, update, and revoke mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditLedger.ts: Fetches audit log entries with periodic refresh using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUserProfile: Loads and saves the caller's user profile with react-query and actor calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useEquityCurve.ts: Builds an equity curve from the user's recent trades by computing cumulative PnL.
frontend/src/hooks/useFetchSignalsTest.t: Runs a connectivity test against fetchSignals and shows success or error toasts based on the result.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeartbeat.ts: Fetches heartbeat data for a given account ID with periodic polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication state, login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLicense.ts: Fetches the caller’s license status using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkBotPublicKey.t: Links a bot public key via mutation and invalidates related queries with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveLogs.ts: Pulls recent trades for the user's account on a short interval to provide live logs.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfileSettings.ts: Empty file with no implemented logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetBotUrl.ts: Mutation hook to validate and set a bot URL, with success/error toasts and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripe.ts: Stripe hooks for checking configuration, updating settings, creating checkout sessions, and querying session status.
frontend/src/hooks/useTiers.ts: Provides queries for listing subscription tiers and fetching a specific tier via the actor API.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrades.ts: Fetches paginated trades using actor queries keyed by filters and pagination params.
frontend/src/hooks/useUplink.ts: Hooks for getting bot profile and toggling uplink state with cache invalidation and toasts.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles and theme variables for a dark Cupertino-inspired UI, plus glass utility.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility merging clsx and tailwind-merge to build className strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query, identity provider, and rendering the app.
frontend/src/screens/AdminScreen.tsx: Admin panel UI for managing licenses with create, update, and revoke actions.
frontend/src/screens/DashboardScreen.tsx: Dashboard layout combining uplink control, live terminal, telemetry, and audit panels.
frontend/src/screens/OverviewScreen.tsx: Displays the user's license status and account info with conditional messaging.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentFailureScree: Payment failure message screen with option to return to dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/PaymentSuccessScree: Payment success confirmation screen prompting return to dashboard.
frontend/src/screens/SettingsScreen.tsx: Settings page with tabs for bot connection and subscription management.
frontend/src/screens/TradesScreen.tsx: Trade history screen with filters, pagination, and display of trade rows using data from hooks.
frontend/src/utils/actorErrorMessage.ts: Normalizes actor errors into user-friendly messages with special-case detection.
frontend/src/utils/encoding.ts: Hex and byte array conversion utilities.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Formats timestamps and computes PnL for trades.
frontend/src/utils/tweetnaclSmokeTest.ts: Empty placeholder file for tweetnacl smoke test.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom fonts, colors, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing versions, constraints, known issues, and architectural notes.
